news.t: Invesco S&P 500 Pure Growth ETF Among Today's US Growth Smart Beta ETFs

holdings.infoBox: RZG is an equity ETF with a total of 132 individual holdings. The top holdings are ACM Research stock at 2.78%, Powell Industries at 2.14%, StoneX Group at 1.88%, Argan at 1.80%, and Acadian Asset Management at 1.62%.

overview.description: The Invesco S&P Smallcap 600 Pure Growth ETF (RZG) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Small Cap 600 Pure Growth index. The fund tracks a growth score-weighted index of US small-cap, pure growth companies. RZG was launched on Mar 1, 2006 and is issued by Invesco.

data.title: Invesco S&P 500 Pure Growth ETF Among Today's US Growth Smart Beta ETFs
data.text: Q.ai's deep learning algorithms have identified several of the top US Growth Smart Beta ETFs based on fund flows over the last 90-days, 30-days, and 7-days.
